use_cases: SaaS platforms offering tiered subscription plans with Free, Pro, and Enterprise options
Design and fashion tools displaying pricing with fabric/color customization features
Businesses requiring annual/monthly billing toggle for subscription management
Companies seeking a highlighted/recommended plan tier for upselling
Platforms targeting Indian market with localized currency formatting
ai_summary: A professional three-tier pricing component featuring Free, Pro, and Enterprise plans with an annual/monthly billing toggle switch. Includes dark mode support, responsive typography, and a highlighted Pro tier with 6 features. The component uses ₹ currency suggesting an Indian market focus and includes design/fashion tool-specific features like fabric options and color customization.
